name: Add a Custom Customer Field
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add custom fields to your customers:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab and click "}, {"text": "Custom Customer Fields", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": " button on the top right hand side."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add the details of your new custom field using the table below as a guide:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Misc Field"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This will be the base tag name, eg. [@misc2@]. If unsure leave this field as is."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Name"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This will be the field name as presented on the customer card."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Type"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can make this a text or short text field (255 character max), date, integer number, decimal number, True/False field or a selection box."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Show on Website"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The ability for customers to see this in their account."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Description"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add an explanation of this field."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-061d4e3a"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your custom field now appears on all customer cards, and can be populated manually or via "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1396-customer-import-wizard", "children": [{"text": "import"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
